# Project Skills Migration Reference

Legacy project skill packages were removed after the gl8b migration.

## Current Source Layout

Use assets from:

- `.xtrm/skills/default/service-skills-set`

This location is the canonical source for installer assets, hook scripts, and migration docs tied to the service-skills set.

## Installer Expectations

- `install-service-skills` tests and command paths should resolve assets from `.xtrm/skills/default/service-skills-set`
- Runtime activation still targets project-local `.claude/skills/*` through active skill links
